name: Curried Chicken and Bow Tie Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach chicken by placing it in a large pot with enough cold water to barely cover. Add 6 peppercorns, 1 bay leaf, 1 parsley stalk, 1 sprig of fresh thyme, and 1 onion, carrot, and celery cut into quarters. Bring to a boil with the lid on; reduce heat to low and simmer for 50 minutes. Cool in poaching liquid, then drain, skin, and shred.
2. To make curry flavoring, soften diced onion in hot oil over medium-high heat for about 3 minutes. Add curry powder, white wine, and water. Cook until reduced to about 3 tablespoons. Strain and let cool.
3. Prepare curry mayonnaise by combining all ingredients until smooth.
4. In a large bowl, mix together shredded chicken, cooked bow tie pasta, salt, pepper, and curry mayonnaise until well coated. If the mixture is too thick, add warm water gradually until a smooth consistency is attained.
5. Assemble salad on a bed of spinach and sprinkle reserved peppers on top. Serve immediately to maintain freshness.
